blended.narrative: Vail is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 24".
